
{{< include /secure/_crypto-hash-use.qmd >}}

{{< include /secure/_replay-extra.qmd >}}

{{< include /secure/_other-attacks-matrix.qmd >}}

## aside: key agreement to public key encrypt {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_key-agree-pubkey.qmd >}}

## secrecy properties {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_secrecy-properties.qmd >}}

## motivation: need for authentication {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_encrypt-not-enough.qmd >}}

## Diffie-Hellman details {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_key-agreement-dh.qmd >}}
